name: Pate Aux Patates (Potato Pie)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Celery stalk and leaves, finely chopped
Pastry for double crust pie (9 inches)
Salt and ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Line a 9-inch pie plate with pastry.
3. Mash potatoes with enough milk until smooth; add butter and 1 egg yolk.
4. Combine mashed potatoes, onion, celery, parsley, and savory seasoning in a bowl. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Spoon the potato mixture into the prepared pie shell.
6. Cover with top crust, trimming and crimping the edges to seal.
7. Cut steam vents on top crust.
8. Brush remaining egg yolk over the pastry.
9. Bake for 30-40 minutes or until the pastry is golden brown.
SERVES: 6-8
